title: trifolium phleoides
intro: Trifolium phleoides, also known as rabbit's foot clover, is a type of perennial herb belonging to the pea family (Fabaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Trifolium phleoides are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Trifolium phleoides can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems.
